name: @keyboard-studio/i18n-content-extract
description: Tier B content-i18n sidecar extractor (spec 046 T027). Walks a fixed, render-verified allowlist of prose fields out of content/patterns/**/*.yaml, content/adaptation-questions/*.yaml, and packages/contracts/data/criteria.json, and flattens them into content/i18n/en/*.json for Crowdin. Never touches the content records themselves. No build step; run via tsx.
